headline: General Mills Sustainability Gains Contrast With Weak Share Performance And Low P/E
summary: General Mills (NYSE:GIS) has released its 2026 Global Responsibility Report, outlining recent sustainability achievements. The company highlights progress in regenerative agriculture, waste reduction, and nutrition improvements across its operations. General Mills reports achieving zero waste to landfill globally and supporting regenerative agriculture on more than 800,000 acres. For investors tracking environmental and social factors, this report gives fresh insight into how General Mills...
